assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has internet access and a modern web browser
Developer has basic knowledge of deploying applications or running code

developer_goal: Create a free Koyeb account and deploy a simple application or sandbox environment to verify the platform's functionality.

first_success.outcome: Developer runs code in a Koyeb sandbox and observes expected output, confirming environment setup and execution capability.
first_success.observable_signal: Terminal output shows 'Hello from Python!' printed after running the sandboxed Python script.

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Koyeb CLI
candidates.reason: While the CLI is mentioned as a management tool, the primary documented onboarding and first success steps focus on the web console and control panel interfaces.

candidates.name: Koyeb API
candidates.reason: The API is available for programmatic interaction, but initial onboarding and first success documented steps emphasize the web console and SDK usage.

prerequisites.description: Create a Koyeb account with Starter, Pro, or Scale Plan to access sandbox features.
Install Python on the local machine to run the sandbox example code.
Generate a Koyeb API token from the control panel to authenticate SDK usage.

external_gates.description: User must create a Koyeb account to access the platform and sandbox features.
User must generate an API token in the control panel to authenticate SDK usage.
Python must be installed locally to run the sandbox example code.

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully deploy and run a sandbox environment that executes a simple Python script and outputs 'Hello from Python!'

sources.title: Sandbox Quickstart | Koyeb
evidence_supported: Managing Sandboxes with the Koyeb Python and JavaScript SDKs
